Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall find the murdered body of a call girl, and a toddler left unharmed in front of her tv set.
Video.title: The Baby Game

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: Tony attempts to protect an informant from a mysterious hit man.
Video.title: Shoot The Breeze

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: Suspicion arises when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who stole her million-dollar necklace.
Video.title: Hot Prowl

Video.summary: After Tony arrests Stan's murderer and Ross is convicted, he and his family must take refuge
Video.title: The Iceman Cometh

Video.summary: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.
Video.title: Renegade

Video.summary: Investigating the death of Hunter's former girlfriend - did she jump or was she pushed from a highrise window?
Video.title: Allegra

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a reporter and uncover a plot involving a wealthy industrialist.
Video.title: Turning Point

Video.summary: Detective Doyle helps investigate the real life murder of an actress-turned-prostitute who was cut in half.
Video.title: The Black Dahlia

Video.summary: Loyalties are tested when Hunter jeopardizes a case prosecuted by the Assistant DA, whom McCall loves.
Video.title: Presumed Guilty

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie investigate a puzzling arson case.
Video.title: Sex, Lies, and Kerosene

Video.summary: In an effort make sergeant, Stan enlists an abused wife to catch her suspected drug dealer husband.
Video.title: Sergeant Kelly

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a famous actress and meet her sister, hungry for the inheritance.
Video.title: Naked Justice, Part 1

Video.summary: Mysterious recordings accusing a powerful company of dumping toxic waste seem like a prank, until the killings
Video.title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Image.alt: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.
Video.title: Dead On Target, Part 2

Video.summary: Reno assists a stranded motorist change her flat tire who later turns up dead.
Video.title: Give And Take

Video.summary: Reno's latest bounty kidnaps a wealthy Japanese businessman's daughter.
Video.title: Samurai

Video.summary: Appearances are deceiving, when Reno discovers a look alike is committing crimes in his name.
Video.title: The Two Renos

Video.summary: Reno rolls into town, tracking a gang of vicious cutthroats.
Video.title: Billy

Video.summary: A desperate psychotic escapes from a prison with a plan for revenge against the men who put him behind bars: Reno and Bobby.
Video.title: Headcase
